title: MHRA CEO Lawrence Tallon welcomes Life Sciences Sector Plan
body: "“I welcome the publication of the Life Sciences Sector Plan and fully support its ambition to make the UK a global leader in life sciences and a country where innovation delivers for everyone.  “It’s great to see the MHRA is recognised as a pivotal partner in delivering the plan’s vision - by supporting innovation, protecting public health, and making the UK a global destination for innovators to research, develop and launch cutting-edge medical products.  “Working with our partners across the sector, we will continue to enable safe and effective innovation that benefits patients, the public, and the economy.” "

taxons.title: Research and innovation in health and social care
